General.Name: Sino-Synergy Hydrogen Energy
General.Description: Sino-Synergy Hydrogen Energy Technology (Jiaxing) Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, production, and sale of hydrogen fuel cell stacks and systems in the People's Republic of China. The company offers graphite bipolar plates; fuel cell stacks; fuel cell systems; stationary power generation systems; water electrolysis hydrogen production systems; and alkaline electrolysis water systems. It is also involved in the technology development and promotion; technology research, manufacturing, engineering, and sale of batteries; electrical machinery and equipment, and special equipment manufacturing; and overseas business development. The company offers its solution for public and logistic transportation, rail transportation, backup power, and supply chain applications. The company was formerly known as Guangdong Sino-Synergy Hydrogen Energy Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sino-Synergy Hydrogen Energy Technology (Jiaxing) Co., Ltd. in September 2022. Sino-Synergy Hydrogen Energy Technology (Jiaxing) Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Jiaxing City, China.
General.Address: Hangzhou Bay New Economic Park, Jiaxing, China
